fiservFeeAnalysisV2.noticeText:
IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT YOUR ACCOUNT
IMPORTANT NOTICE:Effective November 22, 2024, Visa is updating the U.S. Custom Payment Service (CPS) qualification criteria for select Card-
Not-Present transactions. Merchants processing recurring billing should review the updated CPS Recurring Bill Payment requirements.
Important Information:Year-end reminder — please ensure your business contact information is current in Control Center. Updated information helps
ensure timely delivery of 1099-K forms and other required documentation.
Starting November 15, the new Control Center experience is available to all merchants. Sign in to ClientLine Enterprise (CLX) to explore the
redesigned dashboard, faster reporting, and improved batch lookup tools.
Your current settings and reports will be carried over, so give it a test drive and let us know what you think.
For more information, visit CLX Resources or contact your account management representative.
